items.summary: Ensure encrypted message records are stored on-chain as ciphertext only, and each stored message includes both participant public addresses as Principals (sender and receiver) so that authorization can be enforced using those two Principals.

Add a backend API to fetch a single message by id that only returns the message if the authenticated caller Principal is either the sender Principal or the receiver Principal for that message; otherwise reject with an authorization error.
Update the frontend message detail view to load the message via the new single-message backend API (by id) and handle authorization/not-found errors with clear English UI messaging.
Update user-facing labels to clearly refer to the two message participants as 'Sender' and 'Receiver' (Principals) wherever the message participants are displayed in message details.
